description_long: This is a modern chest of drawers constructed from light-colored wood, featuring a minimalist design with clean, straight lines. The front face displays four spacious drawers, each seamlessly integrated without visible handles, contributing to its sleek appearance. The wood grain is subtly visible across all surfaces, adding a natural texture and warmth to the piece. The chest stands on four short, black metal legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, providing stability and a touch of industrial style. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood finish, and the top surface is flat and suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. There are no visible locks, embellishments, or branding, emphasizing its functional and understated aesthetic.
description: A minimalist, light wood chest of drawers with four handle-less drawers and black metal legs, featuring a clean, modern design and subtle wood grain.
description_view_0: The front view shows four large, handle-less drawers with a continuous wood grain pattern and black metal legs.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, flat wood panel with no visible features except the wood grain and the black metal leg.
description_view_2: The back view displays a seamless, unadorned wood panel with a consistent finish and no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wood panel and a single black metal leg.
